machine.name: DC Critical Synthesizer
machine.description: Monitors the combined flip-flop states of CoolingControlFF and NetworkThrottleFF. When both thermal and network alarms are simultaneously active, fires a combined critical alert. Implements multi-dimensional failure correlation.

metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.eventSpace: 4D binary FF-state vector at [100:104]: [CoolingQ, CoolingQ̄, NetworkQ, NetworkQ̄]
metadata.role: Detects simultaneous thermal AND network failure conditions; drives DCCriticalAlertFF

singleTransitionAssumption.scope: not applicable — all event vectors are isInitial (combinatorial pattern matching)
singleTransitionAssumption.notes: Both MULTI_ALARM and ALL_CLEAR events are isInitial. The synthesizer responds combinatorially to the current combined FF state on every cycle. Both patterns are always active and respond to exactly their target 4-bit patterns. The 4-element vectors use equals comparators to precisely distinguish SET ([1,0]) from RESET ([0,1]) state for each flip-flop.

correlationMatrix.pattern_1010: Thermal ALARM + Network ALARM → CRITICAL multi-system failure
correlationMatrix.pattern_0101: Thermal CLEAR + Network CLEAR → ALL systems nominal
correlationMatrix.pattern_1001: Thermal ALARM + Network CLEAR → single-system failure, not critical
correlationMatrix.pattern_0110: Thermal CLEAR + Network ALARM → single-system failure, not critical

metadata.description: Detects simultaneous thermal AND network alarm: both FFs in SET state
metadata.semantics: Combined multi-system failure requiring immediate escalation

metadata.name: MULTI_ALARM
metadata.description: Both CoolingControlFF [Q=1] and NetworkThrottleFF [Q=1] are active simultaneously
MULTI-SYSTEM CRITICAL: Thermal + Network failure correlation detected
metadata.action: Activate DCCriticalAlertFF; notify operators; consider workload migration

metadata.description: Confirms all monitored FFs are in RESET (clear) state
metadata.semantics: All monitored subsystems nominal; clear any active critical alert

metadata.name: ALL_CLEAR
metadata.description: Both CoolingControlFF [Q=0] and NetworkThrottleFF [Q=0] are clear
ALL SYSTEMS CLEAR: Both thermal and network conditions nominal

inputSequences.name: Sequential Alarm Activation
inputSequences.description: All clear → thermal alarm only → thermal + network alarm (critical)

metadata.step2: Only thermal alarm (CoolingFF=SET, NetworkFF=RESET): no output from either sequence

inputSequences.name: Multi-Alarm Recovery
inputSequences.description: Both alarms → thermal only → all clear

metadata.step2: Network clears, thermal remains: no output

inputSequences.name: Full Cascading Failure Scenario
inputSequences.description: Demonstrates complete cascading failure correlation lifecycle
